title: satureja oligantha
intro: Satureja oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as mountain savory. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various types of infections and conditions. The health benefits of satureja oligantha include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as essential oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
